快3回本导师.【网：59FC·CC】【网：95FC·CC】【QQ：5075273】【网：35FC·CC】<浏览器手动输入网址>【首单返利50%】【来富彩，马上发】【富彩祝您】【鸿运当头好运来】【财源滚滚为您开】【精彩纷呈乐不停】【大奖小奖进家门】JINYUAN666《金源导师》<br>原文翻译及赏析_作者李白<br>青天有月来几时？我今停杯一问之。<br>人攀明月不可得，月行却与人相随。<br>皎如飞镜临丹阙，绿烟灭尽清辉发。<br>但见宵从海上来，宁知晓向云间没。<br>白兔捣药秋复春，嫦娥孤栖与谁邻？<br>今人不见古时月，今月曾经照古人。<br>古人今人若流水，共看明月皆如此。<br>唯愿当歌对酒时，月光长照金樽里。<br>[![66.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/SsTM0tXD/66.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/hzmjTs1d)<br>[![67.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/C1kx7PGg/67.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/CBM0L4rP)<br>[![68.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/NM6QmycS/68.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/r0p6LwzN)<br>[![82.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/4NNXHNSg/82.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/z3Ms95Nt)<br>[![83.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/DwRhNQy8/83.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/K17CkMT2)<br>[![84.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/1XWhrwj1/84.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/dZTxqkF5)<br>------------------<br>vk.com/topic-238980321_64830561<br>vk.com/topic-238924278_63682453<br>vk.com/topic-239000265_63074667<br>vk.com/topic-239000251_64830524<br>vk.com/topic-238973431_64830657<br>vk.com/topic-238832535_63074703<br>vk.com/topic-239000302_63773519<br>vk.com/topic-238953044_63160515<br>vk.com/topic-238984896_63511468<br>vk.com/topic-238948468_63682491<br>vk.com/topic-239000240_64258452<br>vk.com/topic-239000238_63682481<br>vk.com/topic-238994472_63773572<br>vk.com/topic-239000304_63160532<br>vk.com/topic-238827267_64615327<br>vk.com/topic-238949737_64615325<br>vk.com/topic-239000241_64830595<br>vk.com/topic-238951757_64615330<br>vk.com/topic-239000235_63074734<br>vk.com/topic-239000264_63160551<br>vk.com/topic-238951537_64615342<br>vk.com/topic-239000245_63074739<br>vk.com/topic-238973431_64830703<br>vk.com/topic-238863780_64258545<br>vk.com/topic-238948365_63074762<br>vk.com/topic-239000233_63376138<br>vk.com/topic-239000247_64615334<br>vk.com/topic-239000248_63682527<br>vk.com/topic-239000236_63511508<br>vk.com/topic-239000256_63511509<br>vk.com/topic-239000271_64830628<br>vk.com/topic-239000243_63376147<br>vk.com/topic-238994624_63160576<br>vk.com/topic
